title: Success is accepted novelty without relevance loss—and clear gates to scale.
narrative_role: North star, KPI tree, risks, distribution, and further plan
objective: Close with a measurable definition of success, guardrails, risk mitigation, and a staged distribution plan.

layout.template: KPI tree with risk and next-step rail
layout.right_bottom: Top risks, mitigations, distribution, and decision gates

north_star.formula: Saved or shortlisted cards from artists absent from the selected taste anchor ÷ all recommendation cards shown
north_star.why: It captures the intended behavior—acceptable novelty—without pretending the prototype measures listening retention.
north_star.qualification: Novelty is relative to the participant’s selected profile, not complete personal history.

kpi_tree.outcome: More accepted novelty with preserved relevance

lagging_indicators: Larger-study retention or listening outcomes—future, not measured now
guardrails: Constraint violations and unsupported explanation rate
AI latency, fallback rate, and cost per guided condition
No raw intent, identity, or secret leakage

risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Recruit positive counterexamples and run paired within-person tests
One short prompt, examples, direct controls, and time-to-first-save guardrail
Expand to 300–500 reviewed tracks; disclose coverage; do not generalize catalog quality
Strict schemas, approved vocabulary, selected-track-only explanations, deterministic fallbacks
Visible novelty control; overall acceptance/relevance guardrails

risks_and_mitigations.risk: Feedback appears effective but does not alter ranking
risks_and_mitigations.mitigation: Log score components and verify changed sets after every action

distribution_plan.gate: Directional north-star lift without relevance loss

distribution_plan.audience: Broader behavioral segments and catalog coverage

distribution_plan.gate: Only after mechanism and data-access value are proven

next_30_60_90.actions: Run interviews; expand catalog; review golden intent fixtures
Usability test; configure durable events; freeze study version
Run paired pilot; analyze; continue, iterate, pivot, or stop

content.final_ask: Fund evidence gates, not production integration: interview participants, catalog curation, usability sessions, and a private paired pilot.

visuals.alt: KPI tree connecting accepted novel-artist rate to intent quality, candidate quality, steering effectiveness, and experience efficiency.

speaker_notes: The north star is a prototype proxy; do not claim streaming retention or business impact.
Leading indicators tell us where the mechanism broke; guardrails prevent novelty theater.
Close with the explicit ask and the conditions that would stop or pivot the work.
